div1.entryFree: Outright, directly, without hesitation or uncertainty: kill me o. with looks, Sonn. 139, 14. as the jest did glance away from me, 'tis ten to one it maimed you two o. Shr. V, 2, 62. the king is almost wounded to the death, and in the fortune of my lord your son, Prince Harry slain o. H4B I, 1, 16 (not only wounded). this kills thy father's heart o. H6A V, 4, 2. then must I chide o. H6B I, 2, 41.
